items.headline: Four regional powers converge on Pakistan to broker Iran war talks
items.body: Foreign ministers from Pakistan, Saudi Arabia, Turkey and Egypt met in Islamabad as Pakistan offers to host direct negotiations between Washington and Tehran. Pakistan has emerged as the diplomatic centre after traditional mediators Oman and Qatar came under Iranian fire during the monthlong conflict.

items.headline: European Commission confirms breach exposing hundreds of gigabytes from cloud platform
items.body: Attackers gained access to the Commission's Amazon Web Services environment, stealing over 350 gigabytes of data including databases and employee information. The breach affected websites hosted on Europa.eu, with threat actors claiming ongoing access to internal email servers.

items.headline: Jury finds social media giants liable in landmark addiction case
items.body: A Los Angeles jury ruled Meta and YouTube negligent for deliberately designing platforms to addict young users, awarding six million dollars in damages. The verdict validates a legal strategy targeting platform design rather than content, with thousands of similar cases now pending.
